item:bread.name: Bread
item:bread.description: Baked food produced by bakeries from flour and water.

item:bricks.name: Bricks
item:bricks.description: Fired clay building material prepared for sturdier construction.

item:chest-t1.name: Chest I
item:chest-t1.description: Locked chest returned from a short heroes guild expedition. Open it with a Key I.

item:chest-t2.name: Chest II
item:chest-t2.description: Locked chest returned from a tougher heroes guild expedition. Open it with a Key II.

item:chest-t3.name: Chest III
item:chest-t3.description: Locked chest returned from a dangerous heroes guild expedition. Open it with a Key III.

item:chest-t4.name: Chest IV
item:chest-t4.description: Locked chest returned from the longest heroes guild expedition. Open it with a Key IV.

item:clay.name: Clay
item:clay.description: Raw clay prepared for brick and ceramic production.

item:clay-deposit.name: Clay Deposit
item:clay-deposit.description: Movable clay source used by nearby clay pits.

item:coal.name: Coal Cart
item:coal.description: A mining cart loaded with coal. Used as fuel by smelters.

item:coal-deposit.name: Coal Deposit
item:coal-deposit.description: Movable coal source used by nearby coal mines.

item:coin.name: Coin
item:coin.description: Basic currency produced by markets from processed food and drink, and later by specialist economy buildings.

item:emerald.name: Emerald
item:emerald.description: A polished green gemstone prepared for later treasure recipes.

item:energy.name: Energy
item:energy.description: Prepared power resource represented by a simplified lightning bolt icon.

item:flour.name: Flour
item:flour.description: Milled grain produced by windmills and baked into bread.

item:glass.name: Glass
item:glass.description: Finished glass panels prepared for advanced building and luxury chains.

item:gold-deposit.name: Gold Deposit
item:gold-deposit.description: Movable gold source used by nearby gold mines.

item:gold-ingot.name: Gold Ingot
item:gold-ingot.description: Refined gold produced by smelters from gold ore and coal.

item:gold-ore.name: Gold Ore Cart
item:gold-ore.description: A mining cart loaded with gold ore. Smelters refine it into gold ingots.

item:grain.name: Grain
item:grain.description: Harvested grain produced by farms and milled into flour or used as pig feed.

item:grapes.name: Grapes
item:grapes.description: Harvested grapes produced by wineries when supplied with water near a vineyard.

item:hop-field.name: Hop Field
item:hop-field.description: Movable hop source used by nearby breweries.

item:hops.name: Hops
item:hops.description: Harvested hops produced by breweries when supplied with water near a hop field.

item:iron-armor.name: Iron Armor
item:iron-armor.description: Heavy iron armor issued to heroes before dangerous late expeditions.

item:iron-deposit.name: Iron Deposit
item:iron-deposit.description: Movable iron source used by nearby iron mines.

item:iron-ingot.name: Iron Ingot
item:iron-ingot.description: Refined iron produced by smelters from iron ore and coal.

item:iron-ore.name: Iron Ore Cart
item:iron-ore.description: A mining cart loaded with iron ore. Smelters refine it into iron ingots.

item:key-t1.name: Key I
item:key-t1.description: Temporary cheat-only key used to open Chest I.

item:key-t2.name: Key II
item:key-t2.description: Temporary cheat-only key used to open Chest II.

item:key-t3.name: Key III
item:key-t3.description: Crafted key used to open Chest III.

item:key-t4.name: Key IV
item:key-t4.description: Temporary cheat-only key used to open Chest IV.

item:leather.name: Leather
item:leather.description: Processed leather prepared by tanneries from raw hide and used by clothing and equipment chains.

item:leather-armor.name: Leather Armor
item:leather-armor.description: Flexible leather armor prepared on a training dummy for early expeditions.

item:log.name: Log
item:log.description: Basic wood material produced by lumberjacks.

item:master-knowledge.name: Master Knowledge
item:master-knowledge.description: High scholarship produced by universities and prepared for late-game research gates.

item:nails.name: Nails
item:nails.description: Forged fasteners prepared for advanced construction chains.

item:piglet.name: Piglet
item:piglet.description: A small piglet produced by pig farms and processed by slaughterhouses.

item:plank.name: Plank
item:plank.description: Processed wood material produced by sawmills.

item:pollution.name: Pollution
item:pollution.description: Dirty industrial pollution emitted by smelting. It stays on the board and must be dealt with there.

item:rock.name: Rock
item:rock.description: Movable stone source used by nearby quarries.

item:roof-tiles.name: Roof Tiles
item:roof-tiles.description: Curved fired roof tiles prepared for higher-tier building construction.

item:ruby.name: Ruby
item:ruby.description: A polished red gemstone recovered from low-tier hero loot.

item:sand.name: Sand
item:sand.description: Fine sand prepared as the base material for glassmaking.

item:sand-deposit.name: Sand Deposit
item:sand-deposit.description: Movable sand source used by nearby sand pits.

item:sapphire.name: Sapphire
item:sapphire.description: A polished blue gemstone from better guild rewards.

item:sausage.name: Sausage
item:sausage.description: Meat food produced by slaughterhouses from piglets and consumed by heavy industry workers.

item:stone.name: Stone
item:stone.description: Basic stone material produced by quarries.

item:stone-block.name: Stone Block
item:stone-block.description: Processed stone material produced by stonemasons.

item:sword.name: Sword
item:sword.description: Precise expedition weapon that needs extra iron, finishing coal, and a leather grip.

item:topaz.name: Topaz
item:topaz.description: A polished amber gemstone from high-tier treasure chests.

item:treasure-chest.name: Treasure Chest
item:treasure-chest.description: An open chest packed with gold and gems. For now, it is a rare trophy reward.

item:tree.name: Tree
item:tree.description: Movable wood source used by nearby lumberjacks.

item:vineyard.name: Vineyard
item:vineyard.description: Movable vineyard source used by nearby wineries.

item:water.name: Water
item:water.description: Basic water resource produced by wells and consumed by farms.

item:wheat-field.name: Wheat Field
item:wheat-field.description: Movable grain source used by nearby farms.

item:wine-barrel.name: Wine Barrel
item:wine-barrel.description: A barrel of wine produced by wineries and served by taverns.

item:wine-glass.name: Wine Glass
item:wine-glass.description: A single glass of wine served by taverns.

producer:academy.name: Academy
producer:academy.description: Education building that can produce Basic Knowledge cheaply and turn it into Advanced Knowledge.

producer:bakery-t1.name: Bakery I
producer:bakery-t1.description: Consumes flour and water to bake bread.

producer:blacksmith-t1.name: Blacksmith I
producer:blacksmith-t1.description: Forges expedition weapons and armor from iron, leather, coal, and wood.

producer:brewery-t1.name: Brewery I
producer:brewery-t1.description: Produces hops from water near a hop field, then brews hops and water into beer barrels.

producer:brickyard.name: Brickyard
producer:brickyard.description: Kiln workshop that fires clay into bricks for advanced construction.

producer:clay-pit.name: Clay Pit
producer:clay-pit.description: Prepared extraction pit that produces clay near a surveyed clay deposit.

producer:coal-mine-t1.name: Coal Mine I
producer:coal-mine-t1.description: Consumes bread and water to mine coal carts from a nearby coal deposit.

producer:coal-power-plant.name: Coal Power Plant
producer:coal-power-plant.description: Prepared fantasy power building shell that will later convert fuel into Energy.

producer:farm-t1.name: Farm I
producer:farm-t1.description: Consumes water and produces grain when placed near a wheat field.

producer:glassworks.name: Glassworks
producer:glassworks.description: Furnace workshop that turns sand and charcoal into glass.

producer:gold-mine-t1.name: Gold Mine I
producer:gold-mine-t1.description: Consumes bread and wine to mine gold ore carts from a nearby gold deposit.

producer:goldsmith-t1.name: Goldsmith I
producer:goldsmith-t1.description: Consumes gold ingots, wine, bread, and coal to mint coins.

producer:heroes-guild-t1.name: Heroes Guild I
producer:heroes-guild-t1.description: Late-era guild that sends paid heroes on long expeditions and returns locked chests.

producer:iron-mine-t1.name: Iron Mine I
producer:iron-mine-t1.description: Consumes sausage and beer to mine iron ore carts from a nearby iron deposit.

producer:lumberjack-t1.name: Lumberjack I
producer:lumberjack-t1.description: Produces logs when placed near a tree.

producer:market-t1.name: Market
producer:market-t1.description: First trade producer that converts processed food and drink into coins.

producer:pig-farm-t1.name: Pig Farm I
producer:pig-farm-t1.description: Consumes grain and water to produce piglets.

producer:purifier-t1.name: Purifier I
producer:purifier-t1.description: Consumes board pollution without producing output.

producer:quarry-t1.name: Quarry I
producer:quarry-t1.description: Produces stone when placed near a rock.

producer:roof-tile-factory.name: Roof Tile Factory
producer:roof-tile-factory.description: Workshop that fires clay into sturdy roof tiles.

producer:sand-pit.name: Sand Pit
producer:sand-pit.description: Prepared extraction pit that produces sand near a surveyed sand deposit.

producer:sawmill-t1.name: Sawmill I
producer:sawmill-t1.description: Turns logs into planks when placed near a lumberjack.

producer:school.name: School
producer:school.description: Education building that turns civic support into Basic Knowledge.

producer:slaughterhouse-t1.name: Slaughterhouse I
producer:slaughterhouse-t1.description: Processes piglets into sausage and leather.

producer:smelter-t1.name: Smelter I
producer:smelter-t1.description: Consumes ore, coal fuel, and water to produce metal ingots and pollution.

producer:stonemason-t1.name: Stonemason I
producer:stonemason-t1.description: Turns stone into stone blocks when placed near a quarry.

producer:tavern-t1.name: Tavern I
producer:tavern-t1.description: Serves beer barrels as individual beers.

producer:townhall-t1.name: Town Hall I
producer:townhall-t1.description: Starter civic hub that issues basic settlement blueprints.

producer:townhall-t2.name: Town Hall II
producer:townhall-t2.description: Base food civic hub that issues farming, livestock, garden, and Era III transition plans.

producer:townhall-t3.name: Town Hall III
producer:townhall-t3.description: Food processing and first trade civic hub that issues milling, baking, dairy, cookhouse, brewing, wine, market, and Era IV plans.

producer:townhall-t4.name: Town Hall IV
producer:townhall-t4.description: Civic administration hub that issues education, paper, permit, survey, and improved market plans.

producer:university.name: University
producer:university.description: Education building that can produce all knowledge tiers, including Master Knowledge.

producer:water-power-plant.name: Water Power Plant
producer:water-power-plant.description: Prepared fantasy power building shell with a prominent water wheel for future Energy production.

producer:winery-t1.name: Winery I
producer:winery-t1.description: Produces grapes from water near a vineyard, then presses grapes and water into wine barrels.

item:blueprint-cattle-farm-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Cattle Farm I.

item:blueprint-chicken-coop-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Chicken Coop I.

item:blueprint-vegetable-garden-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Vegetable Garden I.

item:milk.description: Fresh milk produced by cattle farms for base food supply chains.

item:egg.name: Egg
item:egg.description: Fresh eggs produced by chicken coops for base food supply chains.

item:wool.name: Wool
item:wool.description: Raw wool produced by sheep pastures and used as early settlement material.

item:vegetables.name: Vegetables
item:vegetables.description: Fresh vegetables grown in small gardens for base food supply chains.

item:food-supply.name: Food Supply
item:food-supply.description: Packed base food supply prepared from grain, animal produce, and vegetables. Era II master item.

producer:cattle-farm-t1.name: Cattle Farm I
producer:cattle-farm-t1.description: Consumes grain and water to produce milk.

producer:chicken-coop-t1.name: Chicken Coop I
producer:chicken-coop-t1.description: Consumes grain and water to produce eggs.

producer:sheep-pasture-t1.name: Sheep Pasture I
producer:sheep-pasture-t1.description: Consumes grain and water to produce wool.

item:cheese.name: Cheese
item:cheese.description: Processed dairy food produced from milk and used by cookhouses and markets.

item:feast.name: Feast
item:feast.description: Hearty processed food platter that proves Era III food production is complete.

item:blueprint-dairy-t1.name: Dairy I Blueprint
item:blueprint-dairy-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Dairy I.

item:blueprint-cookhouse-t1.name: Cookhouse I Blueprint
item:blueprint-cookhouse-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Cookhouse I.

item:paper.name: Paper
item:paper.description: Processed writing material used by schools, civic offices, surveyors, and improved trade.

item:building-permit.name: Building Permit
item:building-permit.description: Official construction authorization produced by the Civic Office and used as the Era IV master item.

producer:paper-mill-t1.name: Paper Mill I
producer:paper-mill-t1.description: Civic workshop that turns planks and water into paper for education and permits.

producer:civic-office-t1.name: Civic Office I
producer:civic-office-t1.description: Administration producer that converts paper, knowledge, and coins into building permits.

producer:surveyor-camp-t1.name: Surveyor Camp I
producer:surveyor-camp-t1.description: Survey producer that uses permits and knowledge to discover clay and sand deposits for advanced construction.

producer:market-t2.name: Market II
producer:market-t2.description: Improved trade producer that expands the market with paper trade and better feast sales.

item:blueprint-paper-mill-t1.name: Paper Mill I Blueprint
item:blueprint-paper-mill-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Paper Mill I.

item:blueprint-civic-office-t1.name: Civic Office I Blueprint
item:blueprint-civic-office-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Civic Office I.

item:blueprint-surveyor-camp-t1.name: Surveyor Camp I Blueprint
item:blueprint-surveyor-camp-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Surveyor Camp I.

item:blueprint-market-t2.name: Market II Blueprint
item:blueprint-market-t2.description: Build plan that can upgrade Market into Market II.

item:raw-hide.name: Raw Hide
item:raw-hide.description: Untreated animal hide produced by slaughterhouses and processed by tanneries into leather.

item:common-cloth.name: Common Cloth
item:common-cloth.description: Plain woven cloth produced from wool by weaver huts.

item:luxury-cloth.name: Luxury Cloth
item:luxury-cloth.description: Refined dyed cloth used for high-status clothing and later civic luxuries.

item:common-clothing.name: Common Clothing
item:common-clothing.description: Practical clothing sewn from common cloth and leather.

item:luxury-clothing.name: Luxury Clothing
item:luxury-clothing.description: Prestige clothing sewn from luxury cloth, leather, and coins.

producer:tannery-t1.name: Tannery I
producer:tannery-t1.description: Leatherworking producer that turns raw hide and water into leather.

producer:weaver-hut-t1.name: Weaver Hut I
producer:weaver-hut-t1.description: Textile producer that weaves wool into common cloth.

producer:dye-workshop-t1.name: Dye Workshop I
producer:dye-workshop-t1.description: Textile producer that dyes common cloth into luxury cloth.

producer:tailor-workshop-t1.name: Tailor Workshop I
producer:tailor-workshop-t1.description: Clothing producer that sews common and luxury clothing.

item:blueprint-tannery-t1.name: Tannery I Blueprint
item:blueprint-tannery-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Tannery I.

item:blueprint-weaver-hut-t1.name: Weaver Hut I Blueprint
item:blueprint-weaver-hut-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Weaver Hut I.

item:blueprint-dye-workshop-t1.name: Dye Workshop I Blueprint
item:blueprint-dye-workshop-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Dye Workshop I.

item:blueprint-tailor-workshop-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Tailor Workshop I.

producer:charcoal-burner-t1.name: Charcoal Burner I
producer:charcoal-burner-t1.description: Pre-industrial fuel workshop that turns logs into charcoal for advanced construction kilns.

producer:construction-yard-t1.name: Construction Yard I
producer:construction-yard-t1.description: Advanced construction yard that bundles bricks, glass, roof tiles, permits, and civic goods into settlement expansion packages.

item:blueprint-charcoal-burner-t1.name: Charcoal Burner I Blueprint
item:blueprint-charcoal-burner-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Charcoal Burner I.

item:blueprint-construction-yard-t1.name: Construction Yard I Blueprint
item:blueprint-construction-yard-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Construction Yard I.

item:charcoal.description: Controlled pre-industrial fuel made from logs and used by kilns and furnaces before coal mining is unlocked.

item:construction-bundle.description: Master package of advanced construction materials used to unlock heavier expansion and industry.
